query:
SELECT `id`, `ownerUserId`, `name`, `repoUrl`, `githubTokenEnvVar`, `defaultBaseBranch`, `protectedBranchesJson`, `validationCommandsJson`, `serviceChecksJson`, `agentEnvVarMapJson`, `governanceFilesJson`, `governanceBudgetEnforced`, `status`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` FROM `build_targets` WHERE (`ownerUserId` = 1 AND `status` = 'active') ORDER BY `updatedAt` DESC LIMIT 50;
SELECT `id`, `ownerUserId`, `title`, `summary`, `status`, `routeMode`, `buildTargetId`, `buildBranchId`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, `lastActivityAt`, `archivedAt` FROM `tasks` WHERE (`ownerUserId` = 1 AND (`status` = 'active' OR `status` = 'waiting' OR `status` = 'blocked' OR `status` = 'completed' OR `status` = 'error')) ORDER BY `lastActivityAt` DESC LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aAiEZGvt2NNVee.ae03d21acc17 --database 5KVWo4UoTpTyEXqmynzSfU --execute SELECT `id`, `ownerUserId`, `name`, `repoUrl`, `githubTokenEnvVar`, `defaultBaseBranch`, `protectedBranchesJson`, `validationCommandsJson`, `serviceChecksJson`, `agentEnvVarMapJson`, `governanceFilesJson`, `governanceBudgetEnforced`, `status`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` FROM `build_targets` WHERE (`ownerUserId` = 1 AND `status` = 'active') ORDER BY `updatedAt` DESC LIMIT 50;
SELECT `id`, `ownerUserId`, `title`, `summary`, `status`, `routeMode`, `buildTargetId`, `buildBranchId`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, `lastActivityAt`, `archivedAt` FROM `tasks` WHERE (`ownerUserId` = 1 AND (`status` = 'active' OR `status` = 'waiting' OR `status` = 'blocked' OR `status` = 'completed' OR `status` = 'error')) ORDER BY `lastActivityAt` DESC LIMIT 50;
